pattern: A single linear scan that filters by parity and folds the survivors with a running bitwise OR, starting from the identity value zero.
hints: You only care about the even entries; the odd ones contribute nothing.
Bitwise OR has an identity element. What value can you start an accumulator at so the first even number leaves it unchanged?
Initialize the result to 0, walk the array, and whenever an element is even fold it into the result with the OR operator.

edge_inputs.description: no even numbers at all yields zero
powers of two OR to a larger value than any element
evens whose OR is not the max element

stress.description: 100 values across the full range, mixing parities
stress.note: ensures both even and odd appear frequently
